x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -fPIC -shared -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,gw2-speedrun.dll -o gw2-speedrun.dll "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/entry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/shared.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/timer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/route.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/worldrender.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/src/storage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/include/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/include/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/include/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gw2-speedrun.dir/include/imgui_widgets.cpp.o"
